original.query: I can pick one direction for my next school assignment: (A) a single-subject deep dive that’s mostly equations, (B) something that mixes a reading/writing component with a life-science investigation, or (C) a creative arts build with little research. Which option would I be most likely to choose based on what you know about my past requests, and why?
